examples:
Command Example
#
!nutanix-hypervisor-alerts-resolve-by-filter limit=2 impact_types=SystemIndicator entity_types=VM
Context Example
#
{
"NutanixHypervisor"
:

outputs.description: The number of successful alerts resolved. NutanixHypervisor.ResolvedFilterAlerts.num_failed_updates The number of failed alerts to resolve.
outputs.name: NutanixHypervisor.ResolvedFilterAlerts.num_successful_updates

outputs.description: ID of the status of the alert. NutanixHypervisor.ResolvedFilterAlerts.alert_status_list.successful Whether the resolution for this task was successful.
outputs.name: NutanixHypervisor.ResolvedFilterAlerts.alert_status_list.id

outputs.description: Message returned by the resolve operation.
outputs.name: NutanixHypervisor.ResolvedFilterAlerts.alert_status_list.message
